ASBESTOS JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-09-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Dec. 6, 2001 - Jury selection held. Challenges for cause and peremptory challenges made. The following were selected as jurors in these cases but were not sworn - 1. Kevin Knight; 2. Raul Fernandez; 3. Henry Busgoyhne; 4. ________; 5. Nhan Khai Ha; 6. Retha Aguirre; 7. Alice Mubach; 8. ________; 9. Christopher Byrum; 10. Jasmine de Gaia; 11. Brian Lai; 12. ________; 13. Leila Musleh; 14. Jacqueline Octavio 15. _______; 16. Timothy Halbur; 17. Julia Geffert;18. Angela Tseng; 19. Lydia Maxie; 20. Yvonne Corrigan; 21. Susan Reamy; 22. Andrea Garen; 23. Anna Marie Avanzino.

It has been stipulated to start the trial on January 7, 2002 at 9:00 at which time the final seating arrangements of the jury will be addressed. It has been further stipulated that among the jurors selected, there will be six alternates who were agreed upon but will be announced before the deliberation.

Finally, the hearing of the case is continued tomorrow, December 7 at 10 am., out of the presence of the jury, to address certain issues on witness depositions.
